creator: m.r.sopacua@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 143803
add-py-django-widget.patch

Django-datetime-widget is a simple and clean widget for DateTimeField.
It's based on bootstrap-datepicker by Stefan Petre.

WWW: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/django-datetime-widget

Fix:
Buildarchive: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140615123201-44263/

Attention committer:
depends on: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=191057
